title: HR Analytics Expert - Systems and Data Management (m/f/d)
required_skills: University degree in Business Administration, Data Science, HR Management, or related field
Professional experience in HR analytics, people analytics, or HR systems management
Proficiency in SAP SuccessFactors and data analytics tools (Power BI, Tableau)
Strong SQL skills and experience with data warehousing or ETL processes
Excellent communication skills to translate data insights for non-technical stakeholders
Strong project management skills in international, cross-functional environments
bonus_skills: Python or R for advanced analytics
Knowledge of HR processes and workforce planning methodologies
matched_skills: C-level data storytelling (maps to: communication / data insights for non-technical stakeholders)
Project management (Scrum, SAFe) (maps to: project management in cross-functional environments)
Cross-functional team coordination (maps to: project management in cross-functional environments)
Marketing KPI framework design (partial: maps to HR KPI framework development)
Data quality, tracking & QA (partial: maps to data governance / quality standards)
missing_skills: HR analytics or people analytics domain experience
HR processes and workforce planning knowledge
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain HR analytics infrastructure including reporting tools, dashboards, and data pipelines
Develop and manage HR KPI frameworks and workforce analytics solutions for data-driven decision-making
Own and optimize HR systems (SAP SuccessFactors) ensuring data integrity and system performance
Translate complex HR data into actionable insights for HR leadership and business partners
Lead global HR data projects including data governance and data quality initiatives
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any KPI framework design or dashboard development experience, even if marketing-focused
Emphasize cross-functional stakeholder communication and translating data for non-technical audiences
Stress international project coordination experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC, Minth Group multi-market)
Mention any exposure to HR data, people data, or workforce metrics if applicable
If any SQL or BI tool usage exists in background, surface it explicitly

company_info.size_raw: around 5,000 employees in more than 70 countries
